name: manual-qa
description: Manual QA tooling extracted from vb-hopo — on-demand role logins (qa:*) + the manual-runbook Playwright specs. Snapshot; see README.

scripts.drive: cd ../ventures/${VENTURE:-vb-hopo} && ROLE=${ROLE:-owner} START=${START:-/home} E2E_BASE_URL=${E2E_BASE_URL:-https://dev.hopo.io} npm run qa:drive
scripts.setup: cd ../ventures/${VENTURE:-vb-hopo} && npm install && npx playwright install
scripts.hopo:watch: VENTURE=vb-hopo GREP=@smoke WORKERS=1 HEADED=1 npm run test
scripts.verify: COCKPIT="$PWD"; cd ../ventures/${VENTURE:-vb-hopo} && E2E_BASE_URL=${E2E_BASE_URL:-https://dev.hopo.io} npm run env -- node "$COCKPIT/scripts/verify-entitlements.mjs"
scripts.qa:superadmin: APP_URL=https://dev.hopo.io npm run env -- node scripts/qa-manual-user.mjs --role superadmin --api
scripts.qa:owner: APP_URL=https://dev.hopo.io npm run env -- node scripts/qa-manual-user.mjs --role owner --api
scripts.qa:admin: APP_URL=https://dev.hopo.io npm run env -- node scripts/qa-manual-user.mjs --role admin --api
scripts.qa:member: APP_URL=https://dev.hopo.io npm run env -- node scripts/qa-manual-user.mjs --role member --api
scripts.qa:viewer: APP_URL=https://dev.hopo.io npm run env -- node scripts/qa-manual-user.mjs --role viewer --api
scripts.qa:roles: APP_URL=https://dev.hopo.io npm run env -- node scripts/qa-manual-user.mjs --api
scripts.qa:check-env: npm run env -- node -e "console.log('E2E_API_KEY:', process.env.E2E_API_KEY?'set ✓':'MISSING'); console.log('API_URL:', process.env.API_URL||process.env.AUTH_URL||process.env.VB_ACCOUNT_E2E_URL||'MISSING')"
scripts.test:manual: DOTENV_PRIVATE_KEY=$(security find-generic-password -s vb_dotenvx_password -w 2>/dev/null) E2E_TARGET=dev E2E_BASE_URL=https://dev.hopo.io dotenvx run -- sh -c 'npx e2e-provision && playwright test manual-runbook --workers=1; status=$?; npx e2e-cleanup; exit $status'
scripts.test:manual:watch: DOTENV_PRIVATE_KEY=$(security find-generic-password -s vb_dotenvx_password -w 2>/dev/null) E2E_TARGET=dev E2E_BASE_URL=https://dev.hopo.io dotenvx run -- sh -c 'npx e2e-provision && playwright test manual-runbook --headed --workers=1; status=$?; npx e2e-cleanup; exit $status'
